# CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameComplete

**Case**

A new frame was generated.

## Declaration

```swift
case frameComplete
```

## Constants

- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameIdle**: A new frame was not generated because the display did not change.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameBlank**: A new frame was not generated because the display has gone blank.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.stopped**: The display stream was stopped.
